title: Thread abort adds unnecessary timeout on clean stop
description: lora_l2.c:339-344 waits RX_TIMEOUT_MS + 1000ms before aborting thread. In normal stop scenarios, the thread exits quickly after running flag clears. The 6-second total wait (5s timeout + 1s) is excessive for the common case. Consider: k_thread_join(..., K_MSEC(100)) then abort, or signal via semaphore for faster response.
